generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, converting electrical energy (current) to mechanical rotational motion with torque and angular velocity outputs."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox system integrated with gearwheel transmission for the first axis, providing high torque reduction and precise rotational motion within [-90°, 90°] range at max 75°/s velocity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor, measuring angular position for motor output (r_M) with high resolution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox, measuring output shaft angular position (r_G) for backlash and positional uncertainty reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) as primary electrical input for torque estimation and dynamics modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SiemensSinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) and actual values (measured position, velocity, acceleration) via sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerActualDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DController
]

instance ControllerActualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and their interconnections (rotational and current flows)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating BDD components (FirstAxis composed of Motor and Gearbox) with behavioral specifications."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance BaseGearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink base model representing ideal gearbox behavior without friction components (Fig. 4a)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink executable model for Coulomb-Viscous friction characterization in the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink executable model for Stribeck friction characterization accounting for lubrication effects in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model converting input current (I_M) to torque (τ_M) and angular velocity (ω_M) using motor constants and dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating torque/velocity transformations through gear ratios in the cycloidal gearbox system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of measured motor input current (I_M) from MQTT protocol, used as primary electrical input for dynamics modeling."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicsModelingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of measured motor angular position (r_M) from primary encoder, used for backlash compensation and motion analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicsModelingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of measured gearbox output angular position (r_G) from secondary encoder, enabling positional uncertainty reduction."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicsModelingEnabler
]

instance ControllerReferenceValuesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ControllerActualValuesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of actual values (measured position, velocity, acceleration) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerActualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data (τ_M) calculated from motor current (I_M) using motor constants and dynamics models, used for friction compensation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredInputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data (τ_G) at gearbox input/output calculated through gear ratios, incorporating friction models for accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data (τ_out) predictions from base gearbox model without friction components for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BaseGearboxSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionInclusiveTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data (τ_out) predictions incorporating friction models (Coulomb-Viscous/Stribeck) for accurate motion prediction."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling toolkit enabling creation and management of Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams for structural/behavioral modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executing friction and dynamics simulation models with real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DynamicsSimulationService
]

instance MQTTDataAcquisitionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for real-time streaming of sensor data (encoder readings, current) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DynamicsModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamics modeling framework integrating measured data with simulation models to derive torque/velocity/acceleration characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:enables TorqueDerivationService
]

instance FrictionModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Multi-physics friction modeling framework combining white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) approaches for gearbox friction."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCharacterizationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control algorithm optimization platform enabling parameter updates and adaptive strategies based on friction model refinements."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterRefinementService
]

instance DeviationAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis tool comparing simulated (frictionless/inclusive) data against measured data to quantify motion inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyAnalysisService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionCharacterizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi-physics-aware detection of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the cycloidal gearbox using white-box and black-box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides KineticFrictionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance DynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of motor and gearbox simulation models converting input current to torque/velocity outputs with friction considerations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorDynamicsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides GearboxDynamicsInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of time-series sensor data (encoder readings, current) via MQTT protocol from physical twin to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance ControlParameterRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of CNC trajectory planning parameters based on refined friction models to compensate for wear or temperature effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance MotionAccuracyAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Quantitative comparison of simulated (frictionless/inclusive) data against measured data to identify friction-related inaccuracies (up to 30% motion errors)."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionAction
]

instance SysMLModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual representation of SysML Block Definition and Internal Block Diagrams for structural/behavioral analysis of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance TorqueDerivationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calculation of torque values from current measurements and motor dynamics models for friction compensation and dynamics analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides TorqueDerivationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of static friction component in the cycloidal gearbox affecting startup motion accuracy."
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of kinetic friction component during continuous motion, contributing to velocity deviations."
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of viscous friction component affecting motion at varying speeds and load conditions."
]

instance MotorDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of motor dynamics converting input current to torque and angular velocity outputs with friction considerations."
]

instance GearboxDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of gearbox dynamics including torque/velocity transformations through gear ratios with friction modeling."
]

instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into time-series sensor data streams (encoder readings, current) from the physical twin."
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of positional accuracy deviations (up to 30%) caused by friction-related inaccuracies in the gearbox."
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual and analytical insight into the structural composition of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and their interconnections."
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic parameter updates for CNC trajectory planning algorithms based on refined friction models to compensate for operational conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Early detection of anomalies such as sudden friction spikes indicating gearbox wear or lubrication degradation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TorqueDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of torque values derived from current measurements and motor dynamics models for friction compensation and dynamics analysis."
]

// C5: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot including working range [-90°, 90°] and max angular velocity 75°/s."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor
    base:contains CycloidalGearboxSystem
    base:contains MotorPositionEncoder
    base:contains SecondaryPositionEncoder
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor
    base:contains SiemensSinumerik840DController
]

// C12: Components
instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel transmission, and cycloidal gearbox for precise rotational motion."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance GearwheelTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transmission component reducing motor speed while increasing torque output for the cycloidal gearbox input."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high torque reduction and precise motion control within specified operational range."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Data acquisition**: Sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) is streamed at **high frequencies** (not explicitly quantified but assumed to align with the robot’s control loop, typically **1–10 kHz** for industrial robots).
  - **Model computation**: Simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) process data traces with **low-latency requirements** to enable real-time friction analysis.
  - **Visualization updates**: Dashboard refreshes dynamically to reflect **live friction deviations**, with updates synchronized to the **operational timeline** of the robot (e.g., machining cycles).
  The DT synchronizes with the PT’s **operational time scale**, ensuring alignment with the robot’s motion control loop."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **purpose-specific digital shadow** with the following orchestration:
  1. **Physical Twin (PT)**: The **first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot**, including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox.
  2. **Data Sources**:
     - **Sensors**: Motor encoder, secondary encoder, current sensor.
     - **Controller**: Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. (provides reference/actual values).
  3. **Digital Shadow Components**:
     - **Engineering Models**: SysML diagrams describing the axis structure.
     - **Simulation Models**: MATLAB Simulink models for friction and dynamics.
     - **Processing Component**: Executes simulation models to generate friction predictions.
     - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated data linked to their sources.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Dashboard integrating all data traces and model outputs.
  The constellation follows a **one-way data flow** (PT → DS) with no feedback to the PT. The DS is **not a full digital twin** but serves as a **foundational baseline** for future DT development."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin (digital shadow) operates during the **operational phase** of the robot’s life cycle, focusing on the **as-operated** representation of the first axis. It does not cover:
  - **As-designed** (idealized models).
  - **As-manufactured** (geometric or assembly deviations).
  Instead, the DS **continuously updates** its models based on **live operational data** to reflect **wear, temperature variations, and tooling changes** over time. The DS is designed for **real-time monitoring and analysis** during active use (e.g., machining tasks)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Accuracy**:
    - **White-box models** (analytical friction models like Coulomb-Viscous) require **parameter tuning** (e.g., load, temperature dependencies).
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) eliminate parameter identification but may lack physical interpretability.
    - **Multi-physics integration**: Combines white-box and black-box models to balance **physical realism** and **data adaptability**.
  - **Verification and Validation**:
    - **Simulated vs. measured data comparison**: Quantifies deviations to validate friction models.
    - **Uncertainty quantification**: Backlash and positional uncertainty are mitigated by **dual encoder readings** (motor + secondary encoder).
    - **Dynamic calibration**: Models are **continuously updated** during operation to account for wear or environmental changes.
  - **Error Sources**:
    - **Sensor noise** (encoder resolution, current measurement inaccuracies).
    - **Model simplifications** (e.g., idealized gearbox dynamics).
    - **Operational variability** (temperature, load fluctuations).
  The DS does not include **formal uncertainty propagation** but relies on **real-time data-driven corrections**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT involves:
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** for streaming sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) from the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller** to the DS.
    - **Custom data channels** defined in the **SysML model** to link physical sources (e.g., *I_M* from current sensor) to virtual data traces.
  - **Network Architecture**:
    - **Industrial Ethernet** (assumed, not explicitly stated) for communication between the CNC controller and DS.
    - **Low-latency requirements** to support real-time friction analysis.
  - **Data Format**:
    - **Time-series arrays** of floating-point values (e.g., torque *τ*, angular velocity *ω*) for each data trace.
    - **Metadata** (timestamps, source identifiers) embedded in the DS structure."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as a **software system** with the following technical aspects:
  - **Execution Environment**:
    - **MATLAB Simulink** runs simulation models (friction, dynamics) on a **local or cloud-based server** (not specified).
    - **Dashboard** likely hosted on a **web-based platform** (e.g., MATLAB Simulink Dashboard or custom web interface).
  - **Storage**:
    - **Data traces** stored in-memory or in a **time-series database** (e.g., InfluxDB, not mentioned but implied for scalability).
    - **Model parameters** and **metadata** stored in the **SysML/AAS framework**.
  - **Scalability**:
    - Designed for **single-axis operation** (first axis of MABI MAX 100).
    - **Modular architecture** allows potential extension to other axes or robots.
  - **Deployment Workflow**:
    1. **Data ingestion**: MQTT streams sensor data to the DS.
    2. **Model processing**: Simulink executes friction/dynamics models.
    3. **Visualization**: Dashboard renders results in real-time."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards and frameworks:
  - **Modeling**:
    - **SysML** (OMG standard) for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (IEC 62421) for semantic integration of models and data.
  - **Simulation**:
    - **MATLAB Simulink** (industry-standard for dynamic systems modeling).
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** (IETF standard) for real-time data streaming.
  - **Digital Shadow Framework**:
    - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (customized from [15, 38]) as the conceptual foundation.
  The DS does not reference **industry-specific DT standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247) but aligns with **MBSE and industrial automation** best practices."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT implementation includes the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Data Integrity**:
    - **Traceability mechanisms** ensure data provenance (e.g., linking MQTT sources to simulation models).
    - **Metadata validation** (e.g., timestamps, source identifiers) to prevent tampering.
  - **Operational Safety**:
    - The DS is **passive** (no feedback to the PT), reducing risks of **unintended actuation**.
    - **Safety cell constraints** (working range [-90°, 90°], max speed 75°/s) are enforced by the **Siemens CNC controller**, not the DS.
  - **Cybersecurity**:
    - **MQTT security** (not explicitly detailed) may include **TLS encryption** for data-in-transit (assumed for industrial use).
    - **Access control** for the dashboard (not specified but implied for operational use).
  - **Safety Risks**:
    - **No remote operation** of the PT by the DS, mitigating risks of human injury.
    - **No direct control feedback**, preventing catastrophic failures from DT errors.
  The DS focuses on **monitoring and analysis**, not control, thus inherently limiting safety risks."
]
